title: 菊花賞の後に・サイコーのレース！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The front pack rounds the fourth corner! They're
entering the final straight! Which of them will
conquer the Kikuka Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (Hayahide... Her aura's incredible!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The battle between BNW comes to a head! And
the winner is... Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Tickezo! You were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The BNW girls are the best! I couldn't look away
for a single moment!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Haha! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best to give you another great race next
time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, did you see that?! My fans were all super
excited!
choice_data_list:
That's what happens when you show them a
great race!

That's what happens when you show them a
great race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Everyone got so fired up, I feel
overwhelmed myself!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know, it would never have been this exciting
without Taishin and Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I could feel my skin tingle from their intensity!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that we'll have even more awesome races
together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is my next race decided already? I wanna
run with them again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the fan nominations go our way, the Arima
Kinen will be a strong contender, but it's too
early to say that for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, a good target might be the Osaka Hai,
often said to be the race that decides the
greatest senior medium-distance runner of the
spring season.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a fair chance Narita Taishin and Biwa
Hayahide will enter as well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The Osaka Hai? Sure, I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll go full speed at the Osaka Hai and
give my fans a great show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is pumped for her next goal, the
Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, two figures are quietly watching her.
